name: alphavantage
description: Stock quotes, time series, forex, crypto, and fundamentals data through the Alpha Vantage market data API

envVars.name: ALPHAVANTAGE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Alpha Vantage API key claimed from the free API key form

tools.name: Get Quote
tools.description: Get the latest price and volume information for an equity ticker

function.description: Alpha Vantage API function; GLOBAL_QUOTE returns the latest quote

symbol.description: Equity ticker symbol, e.g. IBM or AAPL

tools.name: Daily Time Series
tools.description: Get daily open, high, low, close, and volume history for an equity ticker

function.description: Alpha Vantage API function; TIME_SERIES_DAILY returns daily OHLCV bars

symbol.description: Equity ticker symbol, e.g. IBM or AAPL

outputsize.description: compact returns the latest 100 data points; full returns up to 20+ years of history

tools.name: Symbol Search
tools.description: Search for ticker symbols and companies matching keywords

function.description: Alpha Vantage API function; SYMBOL_SEARCH returns best-matching symbols

keywords.description: Text to match against symbols and company names, e.g. microsoft or BA

tools.name: Company Overview
tools.description: Get company information and key fundamentals (market cap, PE ratio, EPS, sector) for an equity ticker

function.description: Alpha Vantage API function; OVERVIEW returns company fundamentals

symbol.description: Equity ticker symbol, e.g. IBM or AAPL

tools.name: FX Exchange Rate
tools.description: Get the realtime exchange rate between two currencies (physical or digital, e.g. USD to EUR or BTC to USD)

function.description: Alpha Vantage API function; CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_RATE returns the realtime rate

from_currency.description: Currency to convert from, e.g. USD or BTC

to_currency.description: Currency to convert to, e.g. EUR or JPY

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Alpha Vantage setup

steps.title: Claim a free API key
steps.description: Open https://www.alphavantage.co/support/#api-key, fill in the short form (who you are, organization, email address), and the API key is shown immediately. The free key allows up to 25 requests per day.

steps.title: Verify it works
steps.description: Open https://www.alphavantage.co/query?function=GLOBAL_QUOTE&symbol=IBM&apikey=YOUR_KEY in a browser and check that a JSON quote comes back instead of an error message.

notes: Alpha Vantage authenticates by passing the API key as an apikey query parameter on every request (https://www.alphavantage.co/query?function=...&apikey=...); it does not accept the key in an HTTP header.
The free API key is limited to 25 requests per day; premium plans at https://www.alphavantage.co/premium/ raise the limit and remove delays.
